creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 223132
Patch file

Update to 2.30.2.

Release Note: https://public-inbox.org/git/xmqqim6019yd.fsf@gitster.c.googlers.com/T/#u

This release contains security fix of CVE-2021-21300. But in the release note it is explained as following.
    
* CVE-2021-21300:
  On case-insensitive file systems with support for symbolic links,
  if Git is configured globally to apply delay-capable clean/smudge
  filters (such as Git LFS), Git could be fooled into running
  remote code during a clone.
    
And it doesn't apply to FreeBSD. So this isn't security update for us.
